Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Nov-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Patricia Leong appeared via zoom for Yvonne Cooper (administrator).

Ms. Leong stated that she attached the inventory and appraisal to the petition, and that she will refile the inventory and appraisal with the new cover sheet attached. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to November 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by November 07, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Puliego: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Continued To Oct-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Patricia Leong appearing via zoom for Yvonne Cooper (administrator).

Mrs. Leong stated that the Inventory and Appraisal is attached to the petition filed on December 30, 2021, and that she will need more time to file the final distribution. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to October 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Filing of papers due by September 26, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wan. Not reported.
